tweets.text: Happy Earth Day! Today and every day, we’re committed to protecting our shared planet. Thanks to our teams, partners, and customers for being part of this work.

I want to thank everyone for the outpouring of love and thank you for believing in me to lead the company that has always put you at the center of our work. This is not goodbye. It’s a hello to John and I can’t wait for you to get to know him like I do! 🙏 https://t.co/Q43QDG3UmZ
We’re proud to share the progress we’re making in our efforts to protect the planet, including our highest-ever use of recycled material in our products. https://t.co/VtMzXvk3U9

Congratulations to Artemis II on a successful mission! You captured the wonders of space and our planet beautifully, taking iPhone photography to new heights, and we’re grateful you shared it with the world. Your work continues to inspire us all to think different. Welcome home!
Wishing everyone celebrating a wonderful Easter Sunday!
To everyone celebrating Passover around the world, Chag Sameach! Wishing you a special time of reflection and renewal with those who matter most.

So thrilled to celebrate #Apple50 with @paulmccartney! His music has inspired us from the beginning, so this is a full circle moment to close out our celebrations. Thank you, Paul, for proving that when you think different, you have the power to change the world. https://t.co/Gf2tn6j2aO

50 years of Apple, 50 years of innovation.

Thank you to our teams, our users, and everyone who’s been part of the journey. #Apple50 https://t.co/YYkMN24Vzc
Thank you for celebrating 50 years of thinking differently with us at Apple Champs-Élysées, Pedro and Julian! Please send me that track! #Apple50 https://t.co/hzix1Wr1Hh

Welcome TDK, Cirrus Logic, Bosch, and Qnity to our American Manufacturing Program! We're proud to partner with even more companies to produce important components for our products right here in the US. https://t.co/GNvuTtXLqF

Now this is breathtaking! Amazing to see the sails of @SydOperaHouse lit up with Australian artists’ designs made with @Procreate on iPad. We’re proud to support the next generation of Aussie talent and continue to champion creativity. #Apple50 https://t.co/COn0PGsQpa
Great to meet you over FaceTime, Molly! Thank you for the Crybaby, and thank you for celebrating creativity with us for #Apple50 at Apple Iconsiam! https://t.co/AZYQeMOIcQ
Mac just had its best launch week ever for first-time Mac customers. We love seeing the enthusiasm!
To everyone around the world marking the end of Ramadan, wishing you a blessed Eid al-Fitr with friends and family. Eid Mubarak!

Incredible to hear music created by students at Wadleigh Secondary School for the Performing & Visual Arts in Harlem with Maggie Rogers!

We're thrilled to be expanding our partnership with Save the Music, bringing music education to even more schools across the country. https://t.co/pKbTfsn1yl
RT @AppleTV: Congratulations to the entire #F1TheMovie sound team on their Academy Award. https://t.co/9rSXjALUyR

An absolutely unforgettable afternoon in New York at Apple Grand Central! 

Huge thank you to @AliciaKeys for helping us kick off the #Apple50 celebrations. What a way to mark 50 years, and we're just getting started! https://t.co/h67pdhBZP7

April 1st marks 50 years of Apple. Thank you to everyone who’s been a part of our journey. https://t.co/ZeB68ok859

#Apple50 https://t.co/7cXA0rnM9X
Today we welcome MacBook Neo, now available together with the new iPhone 17e, iPad Air, MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, and the Studio Display family. https://t.co/NoDxpnRh0w
Thanks for the tune up @Max33Verstappen. Next time, we race. https://t.co/8jf551iD9s
To the women who inspire progress, drive change, and make a difference every day — thank you. We’re proud to celebrate you today and every day.

iPhone 17e, iPad Air, MacBook Air, MacBook Pro...

And now, say hello to the all-new MacBook Neo!

We’re so excited to bring the magic of Mac to even more people around the world. https://t.co/z2w4RmShRO
A big week ahead. It all starts Monday morning! #AppleLaunch https://t.co/PQ9gM2Gl2r

As part of our $600B commitment, Mac mini will be produced in the US for the first time later this year!

We're accelerating our progress even further— producing more AI servers and opening an all-new Apple Advanced Manufacturing Center for hands-on training. https://t.co/NO5DeZvPwP

Steve was an incredible leader, innovator, and friend whose world-changing ideas moved all of us forward.

Celebrating his remarkable life and legacy today, on his birthday. https://t.co/ajHO2aVVlT
Wishing a blessed Ramadan to all observing this holy month around the world. May it be a time of reflection, community, and joy. Ramadan Mubarak!

“Never look down on anybody unless you’re helping him up.” - Jesse Jackson

May he rest in peace. https://t.co/2Bc92rmKsG
Happy Year of the Horse to everyone celebrating! https://t.co/re3zEb41KG
Can’t wait for the Super Bowl and the  #AppleMusicHalftime Show! https://t.co/hW6A45SBC7

Today we honor Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s legacy of service, his commitment to justice, and his belief that every one of us has the power to make a difference, because as he reminded us, “everybody can be great, because everybody can serve.” https://t.co/DzF70FIGg9
As the new year begins, sending wishes of good health and happiness to everyone around the world!
Wishing you and your loved ones a very merry Christmas!
Merry Christmas Eve, Carol. Be sure to leave some milk out for Santa. https://t.co/KrnX6Nz81k
This Hanukah, let us remember that a little light pushes away the darkness.

RT @AppleTV: The wait is over.

#F1TheMovie is now streaming exclusively on Apple TV. https://t.co/9NmaAMwt0c

More than 100 US companies have already attended sessions at the Apple Manufacturing Academy in Detroit.

Now we’re launching virtual programming so even more US businesses and workers can learn advanced manufacturing expertise! https://t.co/lw8uDlodXo

Battersea Power Station is merry and bright with Christmas trees designed on iPad this holiday season! Thanks to Munya Chawawa and our collaborators for sharing their creativity—every submission brought joy to all of us at Apple! https://t.co/YPsWqlhMmZ

Every year, developers bring their ideas to life in ways that push what’s possible. These winners showed exceptional innovation, user experience, and design—from accessible game design to supercharging creativity. https://t.co/4dAEBy65wy
For 40 years, Apple has been accessible by design. Because we believe the best technology works for everyone, on #IDPD and every day.

Storms across Thailand, Indonesia, Malaysia, and Sri Lanka have devastated communities. At Apple, we’re thinking of everyone affected, and will be donating to relief and building efforts on the ground.
Heartbroken by the devastating fire in Hong Kong. Everyone affected is in our thoughts and we are thankful for the first responders. Apple is donating to relief efforts on the ground.
Holiday cheer, a little bit of magic, and a whole lot of heart, captured on iPhone 17 Pro by a few handmade puppet friends! https://t.co/o1IspQ8RRu
From our Apple family to yours, wishing everyone a happy Thanksgiving

Thanks to Israel Fernández, Amaia, Yerai Cortés, and Dellafuente for helping us celebrate 40 years of Apple in Spain, merging creativity with technology through Spanish music! ¡Qué arte! https://t.co/jmbArqekvF
Thank you to all those who have bravely served our country. On Veterans Day and every day, we honor our veterans, active service members, and their families.
Our hearts go out to all of those impacted by the destruction of Hurricane Melissa. Apple will be making a donation to help with relief efforts on the ground.

Apple’s American-made advanced servers are now shipping from our new Houston facility to Apple data centers! 

These servers will help power Private Cloud Compute and Apple Intelligence, as part of our $600 billion US commitment. https://t.co/maOd3lCGfK
Our new iPad Pro, MacBook Pro, and Apple Vision Pro are more pro and more powerful than ever, and they’re available today! https://t.co/iymogEcWO0
It all begins with a great idea. https://t.co/s72Qnff12H
Wishing a joyful and healthy Diwali to all celebrating around the world! Thanks to Apeksha Maker for sharing this stunning photo taken on iPhone 17 Pro Max. https://t.co/s4BarZip3m
Amazing performance. Extraordinary battery life. Introducing the all-new 14-inch MacBook Pro with M5, delivering the next big leap in AI performance on the Mac. https://t.co/qqjyO2Sj3W
Meet the new iPad Pro. Furiously fast with M5, making it even more powerful for all of your creative ideas. https://t.co/EowZJ7hAt3

We're proud to help small and medium businesses at Detroit’s Apple Manufacturing Academy as they embrace new manufacturing techniques to create new opportunities for their teams, their communities, and our country. https://t.co/3DGOBFGcyq
Happy World Teachers' Day! Today we celebrate the dedication of educators all around the world. https://t.co/uNJKJ9rJmC
Steve saw the future as a bright and boundless place, lit the path forward, and inspired us to follow. We miss you, my friend. https://t.co/0ZF2FLc7Ub

Jane Goodall was a groundbreaking scientist and leader who taught us all so much about the beauty and wonder of our world. She never stopped advocating for nature, people, and the planet we share. May she rest in peace. https://t.co/CLxq9i3xWX

Created manga with students on iPad in Kyoto, visited the team at Apple Umeda, and tried takoyaki before taking in a Hanshin Tigers baseball game in Osaka!

Arigato gozaimasu for the hospitality, Japan! https://t.co/YL7XfB7BBV

A new chapter begins at Apple Ginza! 

This location will always be special: It was our first store outside the US and a defining moment in how we connect with our customers around the world.

We are thrilled to reopen our doors today and welcome customers in Japan! https://t.co/oiaqM3fJGs

One of the most special things about Japan is our team. Thank you for the innovation, collaboration, and energy you bring to everything that you do!

Apple Japanの仲間たち、ありがとう！ https://t.co/gFh36FZZ1t
Thanks to @akiyaspin for showing me the Hie Shrine in Tokyo. It was an honor to visit and learn about its enduring legacy. https://t.co/4koNFtdbD7
Met Pikachu, connected with developers using our software features in amazing ways, and played Dragon Ball Gekishin Squadra at Bandai Namco… Japan is a gamer's paradise! https://t.co/WIilg7NWrM

There's nothing like the energy in Tokyo! So thrilled to be back and be joined by @number_i_offic for a sneak peek of the all-new Apple Ginza, opening this Friday, September 26. https://t.co/SSEcXbLP3m
To everyone celebrating Rosh Hashanah around the world, wishing you a year full of hope and happiness.

We’re investing in communities across the US, including the revitalization of Downtown Detroit. Absolutely electric opening in the Motor City this evening as we celebrate our newest store and incredible product launch! https://t.co/hdVTsSOFTp

iPhone 17, iPhone Air, iPhone 17 Pro, iPhone 17 Pro Max, our new Apple Watch lineup, and AirPods Pro 3… what a day!

So thankful to be with our incredible teams and customers celebrating at Apple Fifth Avenue! https://t.co/oECgNPFD5p

Many thanks to Inez & Vinoodh, Mickalene Thomas, and Trunk Xu for capturing some of the first photographs with iPhone 17 Pro Max. Tonight was such a beautiful display of #ShotOniPhone photography. https://t.co/X3GX9kaooQ
Can’t wait for tomorrow! https://t.co/VT0Js4DVmU

RT @gregjoz: Our new design with Liquid Glass is here!

It’s beautiful, expressive, and instantly familiar.

What features are you excited…

Congratulations to The Studio, Severance, Slow Horses, and all of the @AppleTV Emmy nominees and winners! Tonight was a testament to their extraordinary storytelling and creativity. https://t.co/4bRXSp7kR3
RT @AppleTV: The most Emmy-winning series of the year. https://t.co/pG49DAm6pW

It's iPhone pre-order day and what better place to spend it than at Corning in Harrodsburg, KY! Soon all cover glass for iPhone and Apple Watch globally will be made here. We're proud to be an engine for American innovation. https://t.co/KK9e0Cc5Dh

Stopped by Apple Fritz Farm in Lexington, Kentucky to spend time with our customers and retail team members as they get ready for a big week ahead! Thanks for a fantastic visit! https://t.co/wlHkkdNYzy

Apple Watch helps millions better understand their health simply by wearing it.

Today we introduced two powerful new features: one that will notify you if it detects signs of hypertension over time, and sleep score to give you more insight into the quality of your sleep. https://t.co/f1cvPYy46Y
AirPods Pro 3, the new Apple Watch lineup, iPhone 17, iPhone 17 Pro, and the all-new iPhone Air—here’s everything we just announced! https://t.co/EDPNjpoUW8
Days like today are some of the most exciting moments at Apple. #AppleEvent https://t.co/NWdOtNQVYH

Say hello to Apple Hebbal in Bengaluru and Apple Koregaon Park in Pune! We are thrilled to continue to bring the best of Apple to customers across India at these two new stores. https://t.co/IrTiIA9hY1
Get ready for an awe dropping #AppleEvent on Tuesday, September 9! https://t.co/uAcYp2RLMM
Life is about the memories we make. https://t.co/SVkiA8gGDu

The Apple Manufacturing Academy is now open in Detroit! We welcomed the first participants from industries like packaging, eyewear & 3D printing. We're excited to help even more businesses with advanced manufacturing to unlock opportunities for their companies and our country. https://t.co/WSqVgskQnv

The colors in this #ShotOniPhone photo taken by Nay Jimenez are so vibrant! We're grateful for all the photographers who share their view of the world through the lens of iPhone. Happy #WorldPhotographyDay! https://t.co/eUCO1zaRLO

Apple is expanding our US commitment to $600 billion over the next four years. And our new American Manufacturing Program will bring even more jobs and advanced manufacturing to the US. https://t.co/6KWkTGJN3O

RT @gregjoz: 3 billion iPhones sold!  

Thank you to everyone who’s made iPhone such an important part of their lives. I’m incredibly excit…
こんにちは, Apple Umeda! We’re excited to welcome customers to this beautiful new store in the heart of Osaka. https://t.co/ax8NB6zr6C
We’re thrilled to bring Apple to even more customers around the world… the Apple Store online and Apple Store app both launch in Saudi Arabia today! https://t.co/1iOLkicNvR
From biscuits to BBQ: Ted Lasso Season 4 kicks off production in Kansas City! ⚽️ https://t.co/UDKgXqw68d
RT @AppleTV: 81 Emmy nominations. A huge congratulations to everyone involved. https://t.co/WavArljGIR
The Hearing Test and Hearing Aid features on AirPods Pro 2 and sleep apnea notifications on Apple Watch are now available in Australia, Indonesia, Taiwan, Vietnam, and more! https://t.co/63bBtKoPbQ

We are heartbroken by the devastating loss caused by the flooding in Texas. Thank you to the incredible first responders and all those providing aid. Apple will support relief and recovery efforts on the ground.
Happy Birthday America! 🇺🇸
Huge thanks to @LewisHamilton and the entire cast and creative team for putting such heart and purpose into the film. Can’t wait for everyone to experience F1 The Movie.

So excited for everyone to experience @F1Movie in theaters! Brad Pitt, Lewis Hamilton, Damson Idris, and the entire cast and crew have created something truly special. Thank you for bringing the thrill and passion of Formula 1 to life on the big screen! https://t.co/RXx9xvhzwE
RT @AppleTV: Today at Apple. #F1TheMovie #Severance https://t.co/PXHcQY2HhL
Wishing all the incredible dads at Apple and around the world a very happy Father’s Day!

It’s hard to believe it’s been 20 years since Steve told Stanford graduates to stay hungry and stay foolish. His powerful advice still rings true, and I hope it helps guide this year’s new grads as they begin their journey to become tomorrow’s leaders. https://t.co/eay6nAnDFD
Experience the new @F1Movie trailer on iPhone in a way only Apple can deliver. https://t.co/VYeJcVagKq https://t.co/ej7DWSfT6l
Thank you to all of the developers from around the world who joined us in person and virtually for #WWDC25! https://t.co/Hsw0ZzLCUJ

Expressive. Delightful. But still instantly familiar.

Introducing our new software design with Liquid Glass. https://t.co/8hA0q2aCTf
See you soon #WWDC25! https://t.co/xna3JqcGvp
Love starting #WWDC25 with our Swift Student Challenge winners! https://t.co/DiL29bcfie

We are deeply saddened by the passing of Bill Atkinson. He was a true visionary whose creativity, heart, and groundbreaking work on the Mac will forever inspire us. Our thoughts are with his loved ones.
We are grateful for all those who fought for our freedom. On Memorial Day, we reflect on the courage and selflessness of the heroes who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country.

Emory Hillandale Hospital is using Apple products to transform technology in healthcare, helping physicians and nurses deliver better patient experiences. We’re proud they’re running on our products. https://t.co/WDqf6EJaD3

For 40 years, we’ve believed the best technology is built with accessibility in mind.

We’re proud to share new accessibility features to help more people navigate the world, express themselves, and stay connected. #GAAD
https://t.co/W6YW81e962
Today, we celebrate the mothers who lift others up with love, patience, and strength. Wishing moms at Apple and around the world a Happy Mother’s Day.

Congrats to this year’s Swift Student Challenge winners & 50 Distinguished Winners!

From wildfire safety to expanding access to education, these talented young developers drew inspiration from their local communities to solve real-world problems. https://t.co/uqkFm8tsAW

Education and technology are a powerful force for opportunity. This Teacher Appreciation Week, we celebrate the educators around the world using technology to open new doors and help all kinds of learners unlock their highest potential. https://t.co/cWbzQCy50I

There’s never been someone like Warren, and countless people, myself included, have been inspired by his wisdom. It’s been one of the great privileges of my life to know him. And there’s no question that Warren is leaving Berkshire in great hands with Greg. https://t.co/7p5zXtq5hP

Formula 1 is on Apple Sports, so you can check out real-time leaderboards, interval updates, and more for the Miami Grand Prix this weekend—all at a glance. Excited to follow along on Sunday! https://t.co/JHpbexka6H

Today is Global Close Your Rings Day! 

For a decade, Apple Watch has had a profound impact on people’s lives.

From Apple Park to around the world: celebrate by doing an activity you love, pushing yourself further, or trying something new to close your rings! https://t.co/m1w9jShQVX
Happy Earth Day! 🌎🌍🌏
Joining people around the world in mourning Pope Francis today. He lived a life of extraordinary grace and deep compassion. May he rest in peace. https://t.co/JDSOGe9z3j
Happy Easter to everyone celebrating! 🐰
Hiking at our national parks is one of my favorite things to do, and Apple Maps has thousands of amazing trails and hikes to discover. Happy #NationalParkWeek! https://t.co/ar9C6BW1XL

Five years ago, we set an ambitious goal to become carbon neutral across every part of our business by 2030.

Today, we’re announcing we’ve reduced our global emissions by more than 60%—and we’re using more recycled materials and renewable energy than ever before. https://t.co/UkN7RdGISo
RT @gregjoz: Congrats to these emerging filmmakers for bringing their creative visions to life with iPhone 16 Pro Max and MacBook Pro at th…
I hope everyone celebrating Passover has gatherings full of great company, love, and tradition. Chag Sameach!
Our hearts go out to all those in Myanmar and Thailand affected by the devastating earthquake. Apple is donating to support relief efforts on the ground.
Sending everyone celebrating Eid al-Fitr around the world wishes of health and happiness. Eid Mubarak!

Season 3 of Severance is available upon request. 
- Tim C. https://t.co/cnctZIRDNF
